fields.title: [e2e] Correlate Playwright browser runs with backend tracing sessions
[e2e] Correlate Playwright browser runs with backend tracing sessions
[e2e] Correlate Playwright browser runs with backend tracing sessions
fields.validation_summary: Added a shared Playwright helper that seeds a deterministic per-test viewer session id before page load, updated the shared tracing-console suite to assert the x-session-id header reaches /api/client-log, and updated the viewer-api client-log endpoint to persist session_id into ingested records. Focused viewer-api tests passed for client_log_ingest_persists_session_id_from_header and with_session_id_preserves_existing_session_id, full cargo test -p viewer-api passed (32 passed, 2 ignored), and TS diagnostics reported no errors for the touched shared helper files.
